results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√yā P. -yāti, to go or proceed together, go, wander, travel,  TS.  &c. &c.;
to come together, meet, encounter (as friends or foes), contend with (acc.),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to come to or into, attain (any state or condition, e.g. ekatāṃ saṃ-√yā, ‘to go to oneness, become one’),  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.;
to conform to (acc.),  MBh.

results.rendered_html:
saṃyā 2 P.
1 To go or proceed together.
2 To go away, depart, walk away;  Bg. 15. 8. 
3 To go to, go or enter into; tathā śarīrāṇi vihāya jīrṇānyanyāni saṃyāti navāni dehī  Bg. 2. 22. 
4 To reach or attain to.
5 To assemble, meet.
6 To fight.
7 To be directed towards, aim at.
